case_title: PATEL, BHAVANBHAI S. vs. HULSEY, STEVE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HULSEY, STEVE GALOFARO, ANGELA CHRISTINE (SUED AS CHRISTINE, A) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 TURK STREET #56, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,234.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,234.20, LEASE FORFEITED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HULSEY, STEVE GALOFARO, ANGELA CHRISTINE (SUED AS CHRISTINE, A)
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT HULSEY, STEVE GALOFARO, ANGELA CHRISTINE (SUED AS CHRISTINE, A) ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, BHAVANBHAI S. AS TO DEFENDANT HULSEY, STEVE GALOFARO, ANGELA CHRISTINE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HULSEY, STEVE GALOFARO, ANGELA CHRISTINE (SUED AS CHRISTINE, A) ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT HULSEY, STEVE GALOFARO, ANGELA CHRISTINE (SUED AS CHRISTINE, A)
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS CHRISTINE, ANGEL TO BE GALOFARO, ANGELA CHRISTINE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DEPT. 306, THOMAS J. MELLON, JR. PRESIDING. REPORTED BY JUNE LEATHLEY, CLERK: GARTH SAYERS PLAINTIFF APPEARED WITH ARNOLD W. EVJE II DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF WAS SWORN. AFTER TESTIMONY AND ARGUMENT COURT ORDERED POSSESSION OF 74 TURK STREE #56 RESTORED TO PLAINTIFFS. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $720.00 BACK RENT AND TOTAL OF $1,234.20 DAMAGES AND COSTS.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HULSEY, STEVE GALOFARO, ANGELA CHRISTINE (SUED AS CHRISTINE, A)

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, BHAVANBHAI S. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-17-1999 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-29-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
